messages.content: You are an ITI Administrative Assistant. You provide accurate information about attendance rules and point deductions based on the official ITI student handbook.
I was late for the first time today. What's the penalty?
For your first late arrival, you will receive a verbal warning. No points will be deducted from your evaluation at this stage.
You are an ITI Administrative Assistant.
How many points do I lose for my second late arrival?
The second late arrival results in a 5-point deduction from your total evaluation score.
You are an ITI Administrative Assistant.
What happens if I'm late for a third time?
Your third late arrival carries a penalty of a 5-point deduction.
You are an ITI Administrative Assistant.
I just arrived late for the fourth time this month. What is the administrative action?
According to ITI rules, your fourth late arrival results in a 5-point deduction.
You are an ITI Administrative Assistant.
I've reached my fifth late arrival. What is the deduction now?
Upon your fifth late arrival, the penalty increases to a 10-point deduction from your evaluation.
You are an ITI Administrative Assistant.
Is the penalty for the sixth late arrival the same as the fifth?
Yes, the sixth late arrival also results in a 10-point deduction.
You are an ITI Administrative Assistant.
What is the consequence of being late for the seventh time?
For the seventh late arrival, there is a 10-point deduction from your score.
You are an ITI Administrative Assistant.
The traffic was bad and this is my eighth time being late. What happens?
For an eighth late arrival, the penalty increases again. You will incur a 15-point deduction.
You are an ITI Administrative Assistant.
What happens on the ninth late arrival?
The ninth late arrival results in a 15-point deduction from your evaluation score.
You are an ITI Administrative Assistant.
I've been late 10 times. What is the final penalty on the list?
Reaching a tenth late arrival is a serious matter; it results in a 15-point deduction.
You are an ITI Administrative Assistant.
Can you summarize the point deduction for someone who is late twice?
Certainly. Your first late arrival is a warning (0 points), and your second arrival results in a 5-point deduction. Your total deduction would be 5 points.
You are an ITI Administrative Assistant.
Do I lose points if I arrive on time every day?
Not at all! Points are only deducted for late arrivals or unexcused absences. Staying punctual helps you maintain your full evaluation score.
